vocab.meaning: những điểm tương đồng đáng kinh ngạc
vocab.example: There are striking parallels between my brother's love for abstract painting and my own interest in graphic design.
When it comes to leisure activities, I am a polar opposite to my sister; she thrives on adrenaline sports while I prefer quiet reading.

vocab.meaning: khác biệt/phân tách một cách đáng kể
vocab.example: Our hobbies tend to diverge significantly as I am drawn to high-tech gadgets, whereas my parents favor traditional handicrafts.

vocab.meaning: một thói quen ăn sâu vào tiềm thức
vocab.example: Morning yoga has become an ingrained habit for everyone in my household, regardless of our individual career paths.
Gardening is the only area where my mother and I find common ground, as we both enjoy the tranquility of nature.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động theo đuổi cá nhân/đơn độc
vocab.example: While my family enjoys group outings, I prefer the solitary pursuit of long-distance running.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy một mối liên kết
vocab.example: Sharing a fascination for history helps foster a deep bond between my grandfather and me.
My obsession with fast-paced video games stands in stark contrast to my father’s penchant for slow-paced fishing.

vocab.meaning: có thiên hướng/khuynh hướng sẵn có
vocab.example: I think I am biologically predisposed to love music, as almost every member of my family plays at least one instrument.

vocab.meaning: khác biệt với thông thường/truyền thống (gia đình)
vocab.example: My decision to take up skydiving really departed from the norm in my rather conservative and risk-averse family.
